name: ceo-personal-os
description: This skill should be used when building a personal productivity or operating system for a CEO, founder, or executive. Triggers on "personal OS", "annual review", "life planning", "goal setting system", "Bill Campbell", "Trillion Dollar Coach", "startup failure patterns", "Good to Great", "Level 5 Leadership", "Buy Back Your Time", "E-Myth", "Customer Development", "Steve Blank", "Small Is Beautiful", "Schumacher", "human-scale", "subsidiarity", "Buddhist economics", "permanence".
capabilities: Run daily, weekly, quarterly, and annual reviews with framework-specific questions
Apply 11 coaching frameworks including Campbell, Collins, Eisenmann, and Schumacher
Generate interview-style prompts for self-reflection on people, time, and business roles
Extract patterns from past reviews to build long-term memory and insights
Design ideal lifestyle with TMI calculation and dreamline planning from Ferriss method
Diagnose startup failure patterns using Diamond-and-Square alignment framework
author: 2389-research
securitySummary: Pure documentation skill with no executable code. All content is markdown-based executive coaching frameworks. Static findings are false positives: backticks are Markdown formatting, URLs are author attributions, and business terms were misidentified as security patterns.
valueStatement: Executives lack structured reflection systems for strategic thinking. This skill provides 11 proven frameworks from Bill Campbell, Jim Collins, Dan Martell, and E.F. Schumacher to build lasting clarity and avoid productivity theater.
userTitle: Build your CEO personal operating system
limitations: This is a reflection system, not a task manager or calendar integration
No automatic data collection from calendar, email, or external applications
User must manually complete reviews and upload past documents for pattern extraction
Does not integrate with external productivity tools, APIs, or third-party services

useCases.title: Annual strategic reflection
useCases.description: Run comprehensive year-end reviews using Gustin method with wins, lessons, relationships, and energy patterns

useCases.title: Client coaching sessions
useCases.description: Use Campbell coaching principles and interview scripts to guide clients through leadership development

useCases.title: Venture health check
useCases.description: Diagnose vulnerability to Eisenmann failure patterns and assess Diamond-Square alignment for business health

promptTemplates.title: Start annual review
promptTemplates.prompt: Help me run a full annual review using the Gustin framework. Ask me each question one by one.

promptTemplates.title: Analyze time use
promptTemplates.prompt: Run a time audit with me using the Martell DRIP matrix. What questions should I ask myself?

promptTemplates.title: Check venture health
promptTemplates.prompt: Which of the six Eisenmann failure patterns might my startup be vulnerable to? Walk me through the Diamond-Square framework.

promptTemplates.title: Build personal OS
promptTemplates.prompt: I want to build a complete CEO personal operating system. What directories and files do I need to create?

bestPractices: Start with daily checks (5 minutes max) and build up to quarterly reviews (2-3 hours) as you develop the habit
Upload past reviews to uploads/ folder so the skill can extract patterns and themes over time
Use the Campbell Yardstick question as your north star: Who have I helped become a great leader?
antiPatterns: Using generic frameworks like Eisenhower Matrix instead of the specified coaching frameworks
Converting this reflection system into a task manager with to-do lists and action items
Using hustle culture language like crush it, 10x your output, or optimize every minute

faq.question: Is this skill compatible with Claude Code?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code. It triggers on personal OS, annual review, and framework names.

faq.question: What is the time commitment for each review cadence?
faq.answer: Daily: 5 minutes max. Weekly: 30-45 minutes. Quarterly: 2-3 hours. Annual: 4-6 hours. Adjust based on your needs.

faq.question: Can I integrate this with my existing calendar?
faq.answer: No. This is a standalone reflection system. You manually record insights after completing reviews in your own notes.

faq.question: Is my reflection data stored securely?
faq.answer: All data stays in your local ceo-personal-os directory. Nothing is sent to external servers. You control your own files.

faq.question: How is this different from other productivity systems?
faq.answer: This is a reflection system, not a task manager. It focuses on clarity over productivity theater using proven executive coaching frameworks.

faq.question: What frameworks are included?
faq.answer: 11 frameworks: Gustin Annual Review, Ferriss Lifestyle Costing, Robbins Vivid Vision, Lieberman Life Map, Campbell Coaching, Eisenmann Failure Patterns, Collins Good to Great, Martell Buy Back Your Time, Gerber E-Myth, Blank Customer Development, Schumacher Human-Scale Economics.
